chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CONST. PETITION No. D-395 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1885/2020 2. For hearing of Main Case 14.02.2022 Mr. Imran Iqbal Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Rafiq Rajorvi, Addl. Advocate General Sindh.-.-.-. Through this petition, the Petitioner has assailed the vires of the Infrastructure Cess, as is now being levied through the Sindh Development and Maintenance of Infrastructure Cess Act, 2017. That controversy has already been addressed through the Judgment dated 04.06.2021, passed by a learned Division Bench of this Court in Const. Petition No. D-3309 of 2011. Under the given circumstances, learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks disposal of the petition in hand in light of aforesaid Judgment. Mr. Rajorvi, Additional Advocate General, Sindh does not oppose the submission. As such, the instant petition stand disposed of alongwith listed application mutatis mutandis in light of the aforementioned judgment. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Amjad/PS
